column6: We collect personal data to provide and improve our services.
User information may be processed for customer support and service analytics.
We may share personal information with trusted service providers.
Personal data is retained only as long as necessary for business purposes.
We process data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
Users may contact support to request access or deletion of personal data.
We use analytics tools to understand usage patterns and improve features.
Marketing communications may be sent with user consent where required.
Payment information is processed securely through third-party providers.
We implement security measures to protect personal information.
Data transfers may occur across regions with appropriate safeguards.
Users may opt out of marketing communications at any time.
We do not knowingly collect data from children under applicable age limits.
Cookies are used to improve user experience and service functionality.
Third-party analytics providers may process usage data on our behalf.
Personal data may be disclosed to comply with legal obligations.
We maintain internal policies governing access to personal data.
Data retention periods are defined based on legal and operational needs.
Users may request correction of inaccurate personal information.
Security incidents are handled in accordance with incident response policies.
